channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US Banks Asked to Identify Potential Iranian Money Laundering
item.description: The Treasury Department is urging U.S. banks to identify potential Iranian money laundering networks.

item.title: Rasmussen Poll: Voters Concerned About Election Security
item.description: A recent Rasmussen poll indicates significant voter concern regarding potential hacking and fraud in the upcoming midterm elections.

item.title: FBI Crime Data Analysis Reveals Potential Omissions
Pentagon releases UFO files detailing near-miss incident
item.description: Documents reveal a U.S. intelligence official reported an encounter with unidentified, super-heated objects.
